content.content: Designer known for his edgy and masculine womenswear collections. He's also served as the creative director of Balenciaga. At 18, he moved to New York to attend Parsons The New School for Design. He received the CFDA/Vogue Fashion Fund Award in 2008. Aside from prestige, he was also awarded $200,000. He was born to Taiwanese-American parents. SocialiteKim Kardashianhas been a fan of his work for several years.
